title: The Weight
album: Rolling Stone Magazine's 500 Greatest Songs Of All Time
why_this_song: The Weight by The Band (1968) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And (and) (and) you put the load right on me

Go down, Miss Moses, there's nothin' you can say
It's just ol' Luke and Luke's waitin' on the Judgment Day

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "load" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "load" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fanny" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fanny" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "The Weight" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "The Weight" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "The Weight", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "The Weight", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Weight" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Weight" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "The Weight" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "The Weight"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "The Weight" was released in 1968. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "The Weight" foi lançada em 1968. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Band one question about "The Weight", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Band sobre "The Weight", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "The Weight" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "The Weight" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Weight" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Weight" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Weight" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Weight", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Weight" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Weight" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
